title: Vanilla 3D Doors
description: Adds simple 3D to doors and trapdoors
body: ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/RiVrIOEA/images/675980675e63d85c8f831f49e4f1cb5bf3c14f78.png) This resource pack replaces the models of doors and trapdoors with 3D, but without additional 3D handles and recesses. Made by CuDsan using Blockbench. Current pack version: **1.20.5** [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/simple-3d-doors) [](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/vanilla-3d-doors/)
